headline: The Path to 10x (Part II): Innodata’s Core Engines
summary: Innodata (INOD) might be one of the most polarizing artificial intelligence stocks out there. But it could also be one of the biggest winners over the next decade.

headline: Love Stories Unwind
summary: The average S&P 500 stock gained 35% in the year leading up to the index's most recent all-time closing high made last Thursday (5/14).
